steps.title: Turn the function value into an equation
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=5x+8$, and the question says $f(x)=58$. Set the expression equal to $58$: $$5x+8=58.$$

steps.title: Solve for the input
steps.content: Subtract $8$ from both sides to get $5x=50$. Then divide by $5$: $$x=10.$$ The question asks for $x$, not $f(58)$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: A is correct because $f(10)=5(10)+8=58$. Choice D (‘$298$’) is the trap from plugging $58$ into the function instead of finding the input.
